installCommand: cd ../.. && corepack enable && corepack pnpm install
ignoreCommand: bash -c 'if [[ "$VERCEL_GIT_COMMIT_REF" == "main" || "$VERCEL_GIT_COMMIT_REF" == "production" ]]; then echo "Skipping Vercel auto-build for $VERCEL_GIT_COMMIT_REF (CI handles deploys via vercel deploy --prebuilt --prod)"; exit 0; fi; if [[ "$VERCEL_GIT_COMMIT_REF" =~ ^(codex|claude|codegen-bot|linear)/ ]]; then echo "Skipping preview for agent branch: $VERCEL_GIT_COMMIT_REF"; exit 0; fi; cd ../.. && npx turbo-ignore @jovie/web'
